# REGIME READ — 2026-07-06

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 3 → 3 (STAGE 3 SUSTAIN Day 4 held on VIX broad-market strength, but BEARISH BREADTH TRIGGER STILL FIRING both legs unresolved).** The Jul 3 read framed Stage 3 as "Day 3 sustain, VIX Day 4 sub-18 lock deepening (15.98, 0.98 pts from Stage-2 trigger — closest all cycle), NFP intraday reads market-friendly, but bearish breadth trigger fired both legs (Nasdaq Comp -5.0% touched + TQQQ est. -3.7% below 50DMA), one-sigma adverse path INSIDE 200DMA floor by $3.24, Mon Jul 6 gap-open binding regime-confirmation event." Jul 6 Monday intraday snapshot: **VIX modestly bounces to 16.33 (+1.11% Jul 6) — Day 5 sub-18 lock still held but bounced +0.35 off Jul 3 low of 15.98**, VXN unchanged at 27.98 (Jul 2 close carried), **Gold holds at $4,165.20 (+1.28% Jul 6) — near record, defensive bid persistent**, DXY firms +0.24% to 101.10, Brent flat +0.07%.
- **Total score: +1 → +1 (unchanged arithmetically, composition mixed).** Same total but underlying quality tilts: dealer/sentiment held +1 with VIX bounce +0.35 = broad-market vol relief pausing, still sub-18 Day 5 = regime constructive; **breadth held -1 with warning maintained — Jul 2 breadth-trigger firing unresolved on the equity side (Jul 6 close not in snapshot)**; **cross-asset held 0 — Gold near record + Brent flat = defensive bid persistent even as VIX crushes**; macro held -1 with DXY firming +0.24% (mildly hawkish tilt); geopolitical held +2.
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bullish — VIX close below 15 for 2+ sessions (→ Stage 2):** **NOT FIRED, gap widened back to 1.33 pts** (from 0.98 pts Jul 3). VIX +1.11% Jul 6 bounce. Trigger has moved slightly AWAY from firing — Jul 3 crush momentum stalled on Jul 6 open. Directionally still the closest all cycle but no longer at record-tightest.
  - **Bullish — VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (→ Stage 2):** **NOT FIRED, gap unchanged at 2.98 pts** (VXN carried from Jul 2 close 27.98). Trigger unchanged. **VIX/VXN spread narrows to 11.65 pts (from 12.00 Jul 3)** — first narrowing in three sessions, but Nasdaq-concentration premium still elevated well above cycle average.
  - **Bullish — SPX/NDX new relative highs:** **NOT FIRED — Jul 6 equity close not in snapshot** (snapshot equity data = Jul 2 close still). Cannot evaluate whether SPX/NDX reclaimed relative highs on Jul 6.
  - **Bullish — Broker confirms TQQQ reclaims 50DMA within Jul 3-6:** **UNCONFIRMED — Jul 6 close not in snapshot.** Highest-priority open item from Jul 3 read. **50DMA breach on 3× reset estimate remains unconfirmed either way** — Jul 3 close + Jul 6 close both needed.
  - **Bearish — VIX re-crosses above 18:** **NOT FIRED, gap 1.67 pts** (from 2.02 pts Jul 3). **Bearish trigger has narrowed +0.35 pts on Jul 6 bounce** — trigger moved slightly CLOSER on Jul 6 open. Still 1.67 pts below fire; but momentum has flipped from "away" to "toward" for the first time in the cycle.
  - **Bearish — VIX re-crosses above 20:** **NOT FIRED, gap 3.67 pts** (from 4.02 pts Jul 3). VIX bounced +0.35 = trigger narrowed by same amount.
  - **Bearish — VXN re-tests 30:** **NOT FIRED, gap 2.02 pts** (unchanged — VXN carried at 27.98 from Jul 2).
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 50DMA $76.39 + Nasdaq Comp re-breaks -5% concurrent:** **BOTH LEGS FIRED Jul 2 (partial) — Jul 6 resolution unknown; Nasdaq Comp Jul 6 close not in snapshot; TQQQ 50DMA still unconfirmed by broker.** **Highest-priority regime-transition signal unresolved.** If Jul 6 Nasdaq Comp closes above -5% + broker confirms TQQQ Jul 3 or Jul 6 reclaimed 50DMA → trigger clears; if Jul 6 closes below -5% + broker confirms TQQQ still below 50DMA → trigger fully confirmed, Stage 4 re-entry activates.
  - **Bearish — MOU walk-back / geopolitical shock:** **NOT FIRED** (no incremental headlines in snapshot).
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT REFRESHED** (data gap, Week 5).
- **Notable lens flips:** No arithmetic score changes — same +1 total. **Composition changes materially in three lenses:**
  1. **Dealer/sentiment held +1 with quality-mixed — VIX bounce +0.35 = broad-market vol relief momentum stalled**; still Day 5 sub-18 lock = regime constructive but no longer deepening. First non-deepening session in four days.
  2. **Cross-asset held 0 with defensive bid CONFIRMED persistent — Gold $4,165.20 near record + Brent +0.07% flat + DXY +0.24% firming.** Not upgrading to -1 because Gold near record ≠ Gold spiking (level not delta); Brent not falling further; VIX not spiking = risk-hedge demand persistent but not accelerating.
  3. **VIX/VXN spread narrows for first time in three sessions to 11.65 pts** (from 12.00 Jul 3). First mean-reversion signal in the Nasdaq-concentration premium widening trend. Still elevated well above cycle average, but momentum has flipped from widening to narrowing. **Reading: dealers may have finished their Nasdaq-hedge-adjustment cycle; if Jul 7-8 spread continues to narrow, that supports rotation-continuation base case; if spread re-widens, that supports Stage-4-re-entry case.**
- **Bonus flip — DJI 52W high held at $52,900.07 (0.0% below 52W high), still fresh from Jul 2.** Rotation composition data-point unchanged from Jul 3 read; DJI leadership persistent. **However, the DJI +1.14% Jul 2 rotation catalyst momentum from Jul 3 read has been partially reversed** — VIX bounce +0.35 on Jul 6 + Gold near-record hold + DXY firming suggests some Jul 6 open give-back or at minimum stalled continuation. Snapshot lacks Jul 6 equity close to determine whether DJI extended, held, or gave back Jul 2's gains.

> **Snapshot mix:** Equity indices + VXN + 10Y = **Jul 2 Thursday close** (post-ISM digest, NDX -1.61% extended profit-taking Day 2). VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = **Jul 6 Monday intraday** (post-3-day-weekend gap-open resolution). Jul 3 half-day close + Jul 6 equity close not in snapshot. 10Y refreshed to Jul 2 (up from Jun 26 stale in Jul 3 read).
>
> **Headline signal #1 — VIX bounces to 16.33 (+1.11% Jul 6). Day 5 sub-18 lock held but Jul 3's record-tight 0.98-pt gap to Stage-2 trigger widens back to 1.33 pts.** **Reading: Jul 3 crush momentum stalled on Mon Jul 6 open** — post-3-day-weekend gap-open resolution delivered mild vol re-pricing, not Stage-4-re-entry. Broad-market vol still deep in constructive Stage 3 range (sub-18 Day 5), but the "trigger-closest-all-cycle" moment has passed. **VIX/VXN spread narrows to 11.65 pts** (from 12.00 Jul 3) — first narrowing in three sessions, first mean-reversion signal in the Nasdaq-concentration premium widening trend.
>
> **Headline signal #2 — Gold holds at $4,165.20 (+1.28% Jul 6, near record) while VIX modestly bounces + DXY firms +0.24%.** **Cross-asset defensive bid persistent even as broad-market vol remains contained.** Not "Gold spiking" (level held near record, not accelerating); not "risk-off cascade" (VIX below 18, DXY firming = mild hawkish tilt not dovish panic); but "hedge demand persistent." Reading: **market participants are holding defensive positioning through the Jul 6-10 macro window (CPI Jul 10-15 approaching) even as VIX signals no acute broad-market vol spike.** This is the signature of a **wait-and-see regime with elevated event-hedge demand**.
>
> **Headline signal #3 — Bearish breadth trigger from Jul 2 remains UNRESOLVED on Jul 6.** Nasdaq Comp % vs 52W high still at -5.0% (Jul 2 close carried into snapshot; Jul 6 close not retrieved). TQQQ 50DMA breach on 3× reset estimate still unconfirmed by broker. **This is the highest-priority open item — Jul 6 close resolution determines whether Stage 4 re-entry activates or Stage 3 sustains.** No new data in Jul 6 intraday snapshot to resolve either way.
>
> **Headline signal #4 — DXY firms +0.24% + 10Y refresh to 4.485 (up from 4.372 Jun 26 stale)** = macro backdrop mildly hawkish-tilted vs Jul 3 read. Not a breakout move but incremental data update: yields ticked higher over Jun 26 → Jul 2 window (+11 bp), DXY firmer on Jul 6 open. **Reading: macro lens has slightly hardened; combined with Gold near record + Brent flat = mid-cycle churn with mild hawkish tilt post-NFP.**
>
> **What's changed vs Jul 3:** VIX bounce +0.35 stalls Jul 3 crush momentum (bullish trigger narrows back to 1.33 pts from 0.98 pts closest-all-cycle); VIX/VXN spread narrows for first time in three sessions to 11.65 pts (potential mean-reversion signal); Gold near-record hold + DXY firming = defensive bid persistent + mild hawkish tilt; 10Y refresh +11 bp Jun 26 → Jul 2; Jul 6 equity close absent from snapshot = bearish breadth trigger from Jul 2 remains unresolved; DJI 52W high held from Jul 2; VXN unchanged at 27.98 (Jul 2 close carried). **Net: composition slightly softened vs Jul 3 — Jul 3 crush momentum stalled + defensive bid confirmed persistent + macro mildly hawkish. Regime under active test but no decisive resolution yet.**

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 3 — Neutral/choppy (VIX 15-22, range-bound). SUSTAIN DAY 4 held, ACTIVELY TESTED.** VIX 16.33 sits inside Stage 3 range with 1.33 pts from Stage-2 trigger (widened back from 0.98 pts closest-all-cycle Jul 3) and 3.67 pts margin to 22 bearish. VXN 27.98 Jul 2 close carried. **Bearish breadth trigger has fired both legs on Jul 2 and remains UNRESOLVED into Jul 6 close** — Nasdaq Comp still at -5.0% threshold, TQQQ 50DMA breach unconfirmed by broker. Stage 3 held (not downgraded to Stage 4) because: (a) VIX broad-market Day 5 sub-18 lock holds constructive regime, (b) DJI 52W high persists suggesting rotation not broad de-risking, (c) VIX bounce +0.35 = modest gap-open re-pricing not vol regime break, (d) VIX/VXN spread narrows first time in three sessions = potential mean-reversion signal in Nasdaq-concentration premium. **However this remains Stage 3 with an actively firing Stage-4 breadth signal that has NOT resolved either direction — Jul 6 close (not in snapshot) and Jul 7-8 sessions are the binding events.**
- **Stage Anchor:** Jul 1, 2026 — VXN sub-28 FIRED, VIX Day 2 sub-18 locked, Nasdaq Comp buffer restored (touched -5% Jul 2), quarter-end orderly. Stage 3 = Day 4 of sustain with breadth trigger firing on Jul 2 unresolved into Jul 6.
- **Position:** Stage 3 Day 4 into Jul 6 close + Jul 7-8 rotation-vs-broad-de-risking resolution window. **NFP Jul 3 has released as market-friendly-with-rotation per intraday reads.** **Jul 6 close + Jul 7-8 sessions are next binding events** — if Jul 6 Nasdaq Comp closes above -5% + broker confirms TQQQ reclaimed 50DMA on Jul 3 or Jul 6 = trigger clears, Stage 3 sustain confirmed; if Jul 6 Nasdaq Comp closes below -5% + TQQQ still below 50DMA + VIX bounces above 18 = Stage 4 re-entry activates. Base case Stage 3 sustain with rotation: 45%; Stage 4 re-entry: 30% (unchanged from Jul 3 elevated); extended Stage 3 churn: 20%; Stage 5 tail: ~5%.
- **Confidence: Low (unchanged from Jul 3).** Why Low: (a) **Bearish breadth trigger both legs firing on Jul 2 remains unresolved into Jul 6** — highest-priority regime-transition signal awaiting Jul 6 close + broker confirm; (b) **VIX/VXN spread still at 11.65 pts** = Nasdaq-concentration premium elevated well above cycle average despite first-narrowing session; (c) **Gold near record + DXY firming + VIX modest bounce** = defensive bid persistent even as broad-market vol contained = wait-and-see regime with elevated event-hedge demand; (d) **Jul 6 equity close absent from snapshot** = cannot evaluate whether rotation continues or gives back Jul 2 gains; (e) **DXY firming + 10Y refresh +11 bp** = macro slightly hawkish-tilted post-NFP; (f) Data cadence lagging — VXN carried Jul 2, F&G Jun 17, HY OAS not refreshed. Not Very-Low because: (1) VIX Day 5 sub-18 lock = broad-market regime intact and constructive; (2) VIX/VXN spread narrows first time in three sessions = potential mean-reversion signal; (3) NFP Jul 3 released as market-friendly per intraday reads; (4) No fresh geopolitical shock; (5) Structural floor at $68 200DMA + 4-wk low still exists.
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 2 mild-bullish/grind):** VIX daily close below 15 for 2+ sessions (currently 16.33, **1.33 pts away — widened from 0.98 pts closest-all-cycle Jul 3**) AND VXN close below 25 for 2+ sessions (currently 27.98, 2.98 pts away — unchanged) AND SPX/NDX reclaim relative highs (Jul 6 close needed) AND **rotation continues without becoming broad de-risking on Jul 6 close + Jul 7-8 sessions** AND **broker confirms TQQQ reclaims 50DMA within Jul 3-6**. Timeframe: Jul 6-10 confirmation window.
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 4 re-entry):** **Broker confirms TQQQ Jul 3 or Jul 6 close below 50DMA $76.39 AND Nasdaq Comp -5.0% sustains through Jul 6-7 close** = bearish breadth trigger fully confirmed OR **Jul 6 close on NDX below -2% intraday-from-Jul-2** with rotation-becomes-broad-de-risking (SPX -1%+ concurrent) OR VIX re-crosses above 18 (**1.67 pts away — narrowed from 2.02 pts on Jul 6 bounce**) OR VIX above 20 (3.67 pts away — narrowed from 4.02 pts) OR VXN re-tests 30 (2.02 pts away, unchanged) OR MOU walk-back / geopolitical shock OR HY OAS through 300 bp on refresh.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **holds Stage 3 provisionally into Jul 6-8 with Low confidence** — VIX Day 5 sub-18 lock held at 16.33 but Jul 3 crush momentum stalled (+0.35 bounce widens Stage-2-trigger gap back to 1.33 pts from 0.98 pts closest-all-cycle), VIX/VXN spread narrows first time in three sessions to 11.65 pts (potential mean-reversion signal), Gold near record $4,165.20 + DXY firming +0.24% = defensive bid persistent with mild hawkish tilt post-NFP — but **bearish breadth trigger from Jul 2 remains UNRESOLVED both legs (Nasdaq Comp -5.0% + TQQQ est. -3.7% below 50DMA)**, DJI 52W high persists suggesting rotation not broad de-risking. Total score +1 unchanged arithmetically with composition slightly softened. **Jul 6 close + Jul 7-8 sessions + broker confirm of TQQQ 50DMA are next binding events; CPI Jul 10-15 window approaching.**

Composition softened on VIX bounce stalling Jul 3 crush + Gold near-record hold + DXY firming; strengthened marginally on VIX/VXN spread narrowing first time in three sessions. Regime under active test — Jul 6 close + broker confirm of TQQQ 50DMA + Jul 7-8 sessions are next binding events** |

## Diverging Signals
- **THE DOMINANT JUL 6 TENSION: Jul 2 bearish breadth trigger firing both legs remains UNRESOLVED while VIX Day 5 sub-18 lock holds with Jul 3 crush momentum stalled.** Nasdaq Comp -5.0% + TQQQ est. below 50DMA = Jul 2 regime-transition signal fired both legs; Jul 6 close absent from snapshot means we don't know whether Jul 6 sustained the breach or reclaimed the levels. VIX 16.33 Day 5 sub-18 lock = broad-market says "no crisis" but doesn't confirm rotation-continuation vs Stage-4-re-entry. **Broker confirm of TQQQ Jul 3/Jul 6 close vs 50DMA is highest-priority open item for next read.**
- **VIX/VXN spread narrows for first time in three sessions to 11.65 pts** (from 12.00 Jul 3 → 11.65 Jul 6). First mean-reversion signal in Nasdaq-concentration premium widening trend. **Reading: dealers may have finished their Nasdaq-hedge-adjustment cycle around Jul 2-3.** If Jul 7-8 spread continues narrowing → rotation-continuation base case strengthens; if spread re-widens → Stage-4-re-entry case activates. **This is the most consequential incremental signal on Jul 6.**
- **Gold near record $4,165.20 + DXY firming +0.24% + VIX modest bounce +1.11% + Brent flat +0.07%** = **wait-and-see regime with elevated event-hedge demand.** Not risk-off cascade (VIX sub-18); not risk-on extension (Gold near record); not defensive rotation (DJI 52W-high held); but **hedge demand persistent through CPI Jul 10-15 window approach**. Cross-asset held 0 with mixed composition unchanged from Jul 3.
- **Bullish trigger (VIX sub-15) widens back to 1.33 pts from record-tight 0.98 pts Jul 3, while bearish trigger (VIX above 18) narrows to 1.67 pts from 2.02 pts Jul 3.** First session where bearish trigger narrowed and bullish trigger widened simultaneously — VIX momentum has flipped from bullish-deepening to mildly-bearish-drifting. Still deep in Stage 3 range but the "crush-toward-Stage-2" narrative from Jul 3 has stalled.
- **NFP Jul 3 08:30 ET intraday behavior (VIX crush + Brent stall + Gold firm) resolved as market-friendly with rotation.** Jul 6 open follow-up (VIX bounce + Gold near record + DXY firming + Brent flat) confirms base-case scenario #1 from Jul 3 read: in-line NFP + rotation continues + defensive bid persistent. **NFP resolution has NOT delivered the Stage-2-approach acceleration the Jul 3 read hoped for — instead delivering Stage-3-sustain-with-wait-and-see.**
- **Positioning + F&G + HY OAS data gap Week 5.** F&G stale Jun 17 = 3 weeks stale. NAAIM/COT/AAII data gap continues. HY OAS not refreshed. If credit quietly widened over Jun 26 → Jul 6 (unretrieved), cross-asset score could shift materially on refresh. Flag: CPI Jul 10-15 will inevitably refresh macro read.

Descriptive: not a trade call; just the mechanics of where estimated one-sigma path now sits vs the structural floor.

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI estimated ~46-50 — pulled below midline neutral after Jul 2 estimated -4.83% session. Jul 3 half-day + Jul 6 intraday not in snapshot = cannot refresh RSI. Neutral-to-mildly-oversold momentum backdrop unchanged from Jul 3. Mean-reversion tailwind building modestly on 2-session cumulative ~-9.4% est. pullback.
